nodes.text: Oh, Grub. Look at you. My little goblin, off to save the world.
Here, take this honey cake. Your grandmother's recipe. It'll keep your spirits up.
You've seen Zog? Then it's really happening, isn't it?
Be careful out there, my brave boy. And write if you find a quill.
Oh, you found the old rope! Pip's always playing behind the blacksmith's. That child sees everything.
I knew you could do it, Grub. I always knew.
